title: Crunchy Brazilian Chicken Casserole
description: A kid-friendly Brazilian dish featuring little gem lettuce and a crunchy topping, cooked to perfection in a clay pot. This flexitarian-friendly recipe is perfect for a weeknight dinner.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large skillet, heat the olive oil over medium heat and cook the chopped onion until softened.
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional minute.
In a large bowl, combine the cooked onion and garlic, chopped little gem lettuce, and cut chicken breast.
In a separate bowl, mix the crushed crackers and grated cheddar cheese.
In a clay pot, create a layer of the chicken and lettuce mixture, followed by a layer of the cracker and cheese mixture.
Repeat the layers until all ingredients are used, ending with a layer of the cracker and cheese mixture on top.
Cover the clay pot with a lid and bake for 30 minutes.
Remove the lid and continue baking for an additional 15 minutes, or until the top is golden brown.
Ensure poultry is cooked to an internal temperature of 74°C / 165°F (juices run clear, no pink remaining) before serving.
